notes: The manifest half of Content stories: BuildContentProducts projects a content_products[] menu from the SAME content-session fixture the M232 seeder seeds from (single-source/D9) — per product, played sessions with player+manager seat keys + result paths + has_manager_view + app_base + per-type icon.
